evals.prompt: I've corrected the same thing 3 times now — you keep using tabs instead of spaces in my Python files
evals.expected: Skill triggers, identifies SOUL.md as the file to update, suggests adding a preference rule about Python indentation style

evals.prompt: We just kicked off the new mobile redesign project, let's get started
evals.expected: Skill triggers, flags MEMORY.md and WORKING.md for update to reflect the new project context and active focus

evals.prompt: OK I think we're done for today, talk tomorrow
evals.expected: Skill triggers session-end hook, batches pending updates across all workspace files, presents summary of suggested changes
